exp_desc: ML1 narrow distill screen with flat_legacy router fixed; drop weak distill arms.
cmd: python3 hyperopt_tune.py --config-name config --max-evals 8 --tune-epochs 35 --tune-patience 5 --seed 2753 --run-group fmoe_v3 --run-axis hparam --run-phase P3DISTILL_C03_LEGACY_HYBRID model=featured_moe_v3_tune dataset=movielens1m eval_mode=session feature_mode=full_v2 gpu_id=3 log_wandb=false enable_tf32=true fmoe_debug_logging=false train_batch_size=3072 eval_batch_size=6144 MAX_ITEM_LIST_LENGTH=10 ++search.MAX_ITEM_LIST_LENGTH=\[10\] embedding_size=128 ++search.embedding_size=\[128\] num_heads=8 ++search.num_heads=\[8\] d_feat_emb=16 ++search.d_feat_emb=\[16\] d_expert_hidden=512 ++search.d_expert_hidden=\[512\] d_router_hidden=64 ++search.d_router_hidden=\[64\] expert_scale=3 ++search.expert_scale=\[3\] fmoe_v2_layout_id=7 ++search.fmoe_v2_layout_id=\[7\] fmoe_stage_execution_mode=serial ++search.fmoe_stage_execution_mode=\[serial\] learning_rate=0.001 +weight_decay=0.0 hidden_dropout_prob=0.1 balance_loss_lambda=0.01 ++search.learning_rate=\[1.0e-3\,1.4e-3\,1.9e-3\,2.5e-3\,3.2e-3\,4.0e-3\,5.0e-3\,6.2e-3\] ++search.weight_decay=\[5e-5\,1e-4\] ++search.hidden_dropout_prob=\[0.10\] ++search.balance_loss_lambda=\[0.005\] moe_top_k=0 ++search.moe_top_k=\[0\] moe_top_k_policy=auto ++search.moe_top_k_policy=\[auto\] moe_top_k_ratio=0.5 ++search.moe_top_k_ratio=\[0.5\] fmoe_v2_parallel_stage_gate_top_k=0 ++search.fmoe_v2_parallel_stage_gate_top_k=\[0\] fmoe_v2_parallel_stage_gate_temperature=1.0 ++search.fmoe_v2_parallel_stage_gate_temperature=\[1.0\] fmoe_v2_stage_merge_aux_enable=false ++search.fmoe_v2_stage_merge_aux_enable=\[false\] fmoe_v2_stage_merge_aux_lambda_scale=1.0 ++search.fmoe_v2_stage_merge_aux_lambda_scale=\[1.0\] fmoe_schedule_enable=false ++search.fmoe_schedule_enable=\[false\] alpha_warmup_until=0 ++search.alpha_warmup_until=\[0\] alpha_warmup_start=0.0 ++search.alpha_warmup_start=\[0.0\] alpha_warmup_end=1.0 ++search.alpha_warmup_end=\[1.0\] temperature_warmup_until=0 ++search.temperature_warmup_until=\[0\] mid_router_temperature_start=1.3 ++search.mid_router_temperature_start=\[1.3\] micro_router_temperature_start=1.3 ++search.micro_router_temperature_start=\[1.3\] moe_top_k_start=0 ++search.moe_top_k_start=\[0\] moe_top_k_warmup_until=0 ++search.moe_top_k_warmup_until=\[0\] router_design=flat_legacy ++search.router_design=\[flat_legacy\] router_impl=learned router_use_hidden=true router_use_feature=true router_group_bias_scale=0.5 ++search.router_group_bias_scale=\[0.5\] router_clone_residual_scale=0.5 ++search.router_clone_residual_scale=\[0.5\] router_distill_enable=false ++search.router_distill_enable=\[false\] router_distill_mode=none ++search.router_distill_mode=\[none\] router_distill_lambda_group=0.0 ++search.router_distill_lambda_group=\[0.0\] router_distill_lambda_clone=0.0 ++search.router_distill_lambda_clone=\[0.0\] router_distill_temperature=1.5 ++search.router_distill_temperature=\[1.5\] router_distill_until=0.2 ++search.router_distill_until=\[0.2\] moe_top_k=0 ++search.moe_top_k=\[0\] router_distill_enable=false ++search.router_distill_enable=\[false\] router_distill_mode=none ++search.router_distill_mode=\[none\] ++router_impl_by_stage=\{mid:rule_soft\,micro:rule_soft\}
